items.title: The 1-Minute Market Report - October 5, 2025
items.description: The S&P 500 notched 3 new highs last week, closing September up 3.5% and continuing its strong bull run since October 2022. Read more about the market here.

items.title: If You Invested $10,000 in Apple Stock 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
items.description: Apple is one of the most valuable enterprises in the world.

items.title: Apple or Super Micro Computer: Bernstein Selects the Top AI Hardware Stock to Buy
items.description: ChatGPT’s introduction of generative AI sparked an AI boom that continues to reverberate through the markets today. One thing is already clear: much of the conversation around AI centers on its capabilities, and those capabilities are nearly endless. AI has the potential to bring greater efficiency to a wide range of fields, likely extending to far more applications than we can currently imagine. items.title: How carrier incentives allow iPhones to be more affordable
items.description: Investing.com -- Bank of America said in a note this week that aggressive carrier incentives can make iPhones more accessible, despite higher base prices for Apple’s latest models.

items.title: Magnificent Seven surpass EU GDP: Is this a tech bubble warning?
items.description: The combined market value of the US 'Magnificent Seven' tech giants has surpassed the EU’s GDP, raising concerns of a tech bubble. While valuations are high, comparisons to the dot-com era suggest this may be a structural shift.View on euronews
